summary: Iteration 11 testing completed successfully. Verified hardened pipeline v2 features in value_stocks portfolio including advanced screener, deep enrichment, guidance integration, and consensus voting. All 14 backend tests passed. Frontend UI fully functional with technical signal badges (BULLISH/NEUTRAL/BEARISH), fundamental grades (A/B/C/D), filing insights, and risk flags visible in Holdings table.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/health returns {status: 'ok', service: 'BMIA'}
Backend: GET /api/portfolios/overview returns 6 active portfolios
Backend: GET /api/portfolios returns portfolio list with 6 strategies
Backend: GET /api/portfolios/value_stocks has hardened_v2 pipeline in construction_log
Backend: GET /api/portfolios/value_stocks construction_log shows universe_size=2456, screened_candidates=12, deep_enriched=12, guidance_stocks=6
Backend: GET /api/portfolios/value_stocks holdings have technical_signal field (BULLISH/NEUTRAL/BEARISH)
Backend: GET /api/portfolios/value_stocks holdings have fundamental_grade field (A/B/C/D)
Backend: GET /api/portfolios/value_stocks holdings have filing_insight field
Backend: GET /api/portfolios/value_stocks holdings have rationale citing specific metrics (P/E, P/B, ROE, Graham value, etc.)
Backend: GET /api/portfolios/value_stocks holdings have risk_flag field
Backend: GET /api/portfolios/bespoke_forward_looking returns active portfolio with 10 holdings
Backend: GET /api/portfolios/rebalance-log-all/recent returns logs array
Backend: GET /api/signals/active returns active signals
Backend: GET /api/guidance/stats returns guidance stats with 1285 announcements for 264 stocks
Frontend: Portfolio page loads with 'Autonomous Portfolios' title
Frontend: All 6 portfolio cards visible
Frontend: Global summary shows Total Capital (300L), Current Value (299.7L), Active (6/6)
Frontend: Expanding value_stocks card shows Holdings tab with 10 holdings
Frontend: Holdings show BULLISH/NEUTRAL/BEARISH technical signal badges
Frontend: Holdings show A/B/C/D fundamental grade badges
Frontend: Holdings show AI Intelligence column with data-grounded rationales
Frontend: Holdings show Risk flag text when present
Frontend: Holdings show BSE filing insights when available
test_credentials: No auth required. LLM key configured in backend/.env as EMERGENT_LLM_KEY
seed_data_creation: value_stocks portfolio was reconstructed with hardened_v2 pipeline. All 6 portfolios active with 10 stocks each (~₹50L per portfolio). Total capital 300L, current value 299.7L.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 11 verified the hardened pipeline v2 features. Key changes verified: (1) value_stocks portfolio has construction_log.pipeline='hardened_v2', (2) construction_log shows universe_size, screened_candidates, deep_enriched, guidance_stocks fields, (3) holdings have new fields: technical_signal (BULLISH/NEUTRAL/BEARISH), fundamental_grade (A/B/C/D), filing_insight, risk_flag, consensus_votes, (4) rationales cite specific metrics like P/E, P/B, ROE, Graham value. Frontend Watchlist.js displays all these fields with appropriate badges and styling. Other 5 portfolios were built with older pipeline (no technical_signal etc). No rebalancing has occurred yet.

hardened_pipeline_v2.details: value_stocks portfolio has construction_log.pipeline='hardened_v2' with all expected fields

features_verified: Technical signal badges with color coding
